kitchen-remodeling-cranbury: Cranbury kitchens span tight historic-village floor plans on Main Street and Maplewood Avenue to spacious estate kitchens off Cranbury Neck Road. We handle cabinet matching for 18th and 19th century homes where reproduction trim and specialty hardware are required, and full custom builds for the larger Old Trenton Road properties. Our team coordinates Historic Preservation Commission review when the work touches anything visible from the public right of way.
bathroom-remodel-cranbury: Cranbury bathroom projects often involve carving modern functionality into older floor plans where original plumbing branch lines and plaster walls are still in place. We handle Historic Village properties along Main Street and Maplewood with the deliberate, low-impact approach those homes call for, plus larger master bath remodels in the Cranbury Neck and Old Trenton Road estates. Tub-to-shower conversions, vanity replacements, full tile rebuilds.
handyman-services-cranbury: Cranbury homeowners trust us for the everyday list of small repairs that historic and estate properties tend to accumulate, from sticking original doors and worn trim to ceiling fixture swaps and outdoor maintenance. We work across the Historic Village, Cranbury Station area, and the larger Cranbury Neck Road properties with the careful, no-shortcuts approach Cranbury homes deserve.
home-repairs-cranbury: From plaster patching in Historic Village homes to deck and trim restoration on Cranbury Neck estates, our home repair services adapt to whatever Cranbury throws at us. Older homes here often need finesse work that bigger contractors won't take on, and we handle it without the upsell. Settled door frames, sticking windows, water-damaged trim, drywall repair in newer additions, all in our wheelhouse.
flooring-installation-cranbury: Cranbury floors range from original wide-plank pine in the Historic Village to modern engineered hardwood in the newer Cranbury Station builds. We refinish, repair, and replace with attention to what actually fits each home, plus subfloor work, transition strips, and tile in bathrooms and mudrooms. Older Cranbury homes routinely need subfloor stabilization before any new floor goes down, and we plan for it from the estimate.
door-installation-cranbury: Cranbury door projects span everything from period-appropriate replacement doors for Historic Village homes to modern entry doors and patio sliders on the Cranbury Neck estates. We source what fits the property, handle the framing and threshold work, and finish the trim so the door looks like it belongs. Storm doors, screen doors, and interior door swaps as well.
carpentry-services-cranbury: Custom carpentry for Cranbury homes covers the range from reproduction trim and crown molding restoration in Historic Village properties to custom built-ins and shelving for newer Cranbury Station and Cranbury Neck homes. We match existing profiles when needed, source quartersawn and figured woods for higher-end projects, and handle finish work the way it deserves.
cabinet-installation-cranbury: Cabinet installation in Cranbury runs from custom kitchens in the larger Cranbury Neck estates to careful inserts and built-ins in tight Historic Village floor plans. We handle full demos, scribe and shim to walls that aren't square, and finish trim the way it should be done. Bathroom vanities, kitchen runs, and mudroom storage all fall under this work.
drywall-repair-cranbury: Cranbury drywall work splits between standard repairs in newer homes and careful blending into original plaster systems in Historic Village properties. We patch, skim coat, and texture-match where needed, plus full drywall installation for additions and basement finishing. Plaster repair is its own discipline and we treat it that way in older Cranbury homes.
deck-staining-cranbury: Deck staining and refinishing in Cranbury covers everything from small village backyard decks to larger pool decks and wraparounds on the Cranbury Neck estates. We strip, sand, and refinish with the right products for the wood species, plus repair board replacement and railing tightening. Spring and fall booking fills up fast in Cranbury, so we plan ahead.
fence-repair-cranbury: Cranbury fence work runs from picket and split-rail repair in the Historic Village (where style and material need to fit the period) to standard wood and vinyl fence repairs around Cranbury Station and Cranbury Neck properties. Gate sag, post rot, and panel replacement are the most common issues, plus full fence rebuilds when the existing line isn't worth saving.
